title: alstonia stenophylla
intro: Alstonia stenophylla, also known as the Malabar nut tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Alstonia stenophylla include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive problems, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Alstonia stenophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
